headline: Is BXP Stock Worth Retaining in Your Portfolio for the Long Run?
summary: BXP benefits from solid leasing, asset sales, redevelopment projects and ample liquidity, though office market competition and execution risks persist.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on BXP, Raises Price Target to $68
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains BXP (NYSE:BXP) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $67 to $68.
